titlestmt.author: by Tina Evans and Rosemary K. J. Davis

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday December 5, 2024 at 23:25

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The MATTE records, which span from 2009 to 2021, contain correspondence, writings, printed material, production material, photographs, and other papers relating to MATTE magazine and other projects by Matthew Leifheit.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Matthew Leifheit on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2021.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into three series: I: MATTE magazine production files, 2010-2021. II: MATTE Editions production files, 2013-2021. III: Other publications, projects, and ephemera, 2009-2021.

bioghist.head: MATTE Magazine
bioghist.p: MATTE Magazine is a publication founded by Matthew Leifheit in 2010 to support emerging visions in fine art photography.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: MATTE Records. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The MATTE records, which span from 2009 to 2021, contain correspondence, writings, printed material, production material, photographs, and other papers relating to MATTE magazine and other projects by Matthew Leifheit.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The MATTE Records is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains production materials, correspondence, and other documentation related to MATTE magazine.

did.unittitle: Issue 40 Homeless curated by Curran Hattleberg
Issue 47 Love 2016 curated by Rachel Stern

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains production materials, proofs, and other documentation related to MATTE Editions.

did.unittitle: History is made at night, by David Godlis
History is made at night, by David Godlis
Dogs, portraits, and animals, by David Winokur
Closer as love (Polaroids 1993-2007), by Breyer P-Orridge
Closer as love (Polaroids 1993-2007), by Breyer P-Orridge: proof sheets

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains production materials, posters, ephemera, and other documentation related to projects by or involving Matthew Leifheit, including his work with Vice magazine as photo-editor.

did.unittitle: David Wojnarowicz Magic Box Play Cards
When you fuck me call me Kathy or don't call me at all Brooklyn Dirty Book Fair
